title: Codex MarkItDown Smoke Source Package
description: Review-only source package demonstrating text-PDF and map-PDF extraction behavior for the KosmoReferences ingestion lane.

notes: Source files and extracted Markdown stay local/private unless file-level rights are reviewed.
Public output may use only metadata, source links and own-written summaries.

sources.title: Architekturkosmos AI Workflow Pipeline Projekt Dokument
sources.notes: Text-heavy local workflow document; good MarkItDown candidate.

sources.title: Villa Savoye UNESCO 1321rev Maps
sources.notes: Map-heavy PDF; MarkItDown returns little useful semantic content and a vision/layout pipeline is required.

quality_notes: Good text extraction for headings, role legend and pipeline prose.
Mostly repeated headers and map numbers.
Requires OCR/Vision/Layout extraction before semantic project use.

candidate_projects.title: ArchitekturKosmos Workflow Pipeline
evidence: Source is a workflow/system document, not a public architecture reference entry.

candidate_projects.title: Villa Savoye
evidence: Extraction quality is low because source is map-heavy.

review_gates.notes: SHA-256 and byte counts recorded for both inputs and generated Markdown artifacts.
Local/private workflow document and map PDF must not be publicly reproduced without review.
Text-heavy workflow PDF passes; map-heavy Villa Savoye PDF needs OCR/Vision.
No page-image or layout-block extraction has been run yet.
Villa Savoye maps can support an existing entry after layout review; workflow document is system knowledge only.
No 2D/3D assets should be derived from these source files yet.
Tracked manifest stores metadata only; extracted artifacts remain under gitignored out/.

next_actions: Use MarkItDown-first for text PDFs and Office files.
Add OCR/Vision/Layout extraction for map, plan and scan PDFs.
Keep generated Markdown from private sources out of public repo outputs.
